outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says Iran 'better get smart soon' as talks deadlock sends oil prices higher
outlets.summary: Focus on Trump's escalatory AI gun image post and oil market reaction. Notes peace talks are 'completely deadlocked' with May 1 War Powers deadline looming.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Deadlock over Iran's nuclear program and the Strait of Hormuz cripples peace efforts
outlets.summary: Highlights stalemate in negotiations, Iran's insistence on separating Hormuz from nuclear talks, and US rejection of partial deals.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran resists Trump's blockade and bombing campaign so far, analysts say
outlets.summary: Features Rubio interview rejecting Iran's Hormuz proposal. Frames Iran as obstructing peace while US applies 'maximum pressure.'

outlets.name: Washington Times
outlets.headline: Trump slams Germany's Merz over Iran war criticism
outlets.summary: Covers Trump-Merz clash. Presents Trump as defending strong stance against European 'weakness' on Iran.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Trump threatens Iran to 'get smart soon' amid stalled talks; Israel kills medics
outlets.summary: Comprehensive liveblog covering Trump's threat, Israeli double-tap strike killing 3 medics in Lebanon, and diplomatic stalemate.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: Trump warns Iran to 'better get smart soon' as US plans long port blockade
outlets.summary: European angle: focuses on blockade's economic impact and European frustration with stalled diplomacy.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF blows up 2 vast Hezbollah attack tunnels built with 'direct guidance from Iran'
outlets.summary: Focus on IDF Qantara tunnel destruction (25m deep, 2km long, 450 tons explosives). Frames as major security achievement.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu corruption trial resumes; plea bargain talks initiated
outlets.summary: Domestic focus on Netanyahu's legal troubles resuming after 2-month war pause. Herzog invites parties for plea discussions.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Western media exposes US-Israeli war on Iran as total strategic defeat
outlets.summary: State media frames war as US/Israeli failure. Highlights economic pain being inflicted on Western economies by Hormuz closure.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Iran customs bans steel exports after industry heavily damaged in war
outlets.summary: Opposition-aligned outlet reports on economic damage: 70% of steel production capacity destroyed, $6.1B/year industry shuttered.
